_help: The repo's identity & posture — the one file baseline requires (schema: schema/repo.schema.json). init writes this first; fill in owner and confirm type. Keys starting with _ are inline notes and are ignored.
_type: node | python | service | library | docs — what this repo IS. Supersedes filesystem auto-detection.
_maturity: prototype | claimed | released — scrutiny rises with maturity (CLAIM rules activate at 'claimed').
_workflow: multi-lane (V2 default — any solo dev gets lanes) | single-lane (readiness-only).
_anchoring: strict | relaxed | off — work-to-issue anchoring strictness, orthogonal to workflow.
